data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the check-in tracking functionality, specifically who arrived and when. However, the provided evidence does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality is implemented. The linked use case mentions the need for check-in tracking, but there are no specific details or evidence to demonstrate that this requirement is covered, resulting in a clear gap.
gaps: No evidence of check-in tracking functionality (who arrived, when).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add check-in tracking validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the system records and retrieves check-in data for attendees.
